_note: Committed golden replay values for the canonical USS fixture (signal.uss.json + ohlcv.json). uwrScore/uwrAxes/direction/riskBucket/conviction are produced VERBATIM by the afi-core scorer scoreFroggyTrendPullbackFromEnriched with defaultUwrConfig UNCHANGED (four equal 0.25 weights => uwrScore == mean(axes)); they are byte-identical to the pre-District-2 goldens (District 2 M2 changed the artifact surface, NEVER the scoring math). The hash pins were re-pinned for District 2 M2: digests are now afi.hash.v1 CanonicalHash v1 values (sha256 over the domain-separated preimage 'afi.hash.v1\n<domainTag>\n<canonicalJson>', recursive key sorting, volatile runtime timestamps excluded, declared numeric fields projected to canonical decimal strings). inputHash = signal-input domain digest of the raw USS; enrichmentHash = enrichment-bundle domain digest of the normalized bundle material (bundle minus its provenance block); outputHash = scored-output domain digest of the emitted ScoredSignal v1 projection; strategyLocalViewHash = strategy-local-view domain pin of the opaque enriched view. Committed intentionally as a replay anchor: a recompute that diverges signals nondeterminism or an unreviewed scoring/canonicalization change.
